title: picris strigosa
intro: Picris strigosa, also known as prickly lettuce, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. The plant's health benefits include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve menstrual cramps, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Picris strigosa can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
